msgs.text:
You are an expert Lean 4 + Mathlib (current, ~late 2025, Lean v4.28.0) proof engineer. I need a COMPLETE, COMPILING proof of one theorem. Be extremely careful with exact lemma names and universe/defeq issues. Output only Lean code (helpers + the proof), no prose.

CONTEXT. In a file with `open CategoryTheory Topology`, `universe u`, namespace `Q2Presentation.Profinite`. There is a structure:
```
structure SurjContHom (P Q : ProfiniteGrp.{u}) where
¬† hom : P ‚ü∂ Q
¬† surj : Function.Surjective hom
namespace SurjContHom
theorem hom_injective {P Q : ProfiniteGrp.{u}} : Function.Injective (SurjContHom.hom : SurjContHom P Q ‚Üí (P ‚ü∂ Q))
def comp {P Q R : ProfiniteGrp.{u}} (f : SurjContHom P Q) (g : SurjContHom Q R) : SurjContHom P R where
¬† hom := f.hom ‚Čę g.hom
¬† surj := by rw [ProfiniteGrp.coe_comp]; exact g.surj.comp f.surj
end SurjContHom
```
GOAL theorem to prove (currently `sorry`):
```
theorem profinite_epimorphism_from_compatible_finite_quotients
¬† ¬† (A Q : ProfiniteGrp.{u})
¬† ¬† (hfin : ‚ąÄ N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q, Finite (SurjContHom A ((ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).obj N)))
¬† ¬† (hne : ‚ąÄ N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q, Nonempty (SurjContHom A ((ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).obj N))) :
¬† ¬† Nonempty (SurjContHom A Q) := by
¬† sorry
```

KEY MATHLIB INFRASTRUCTURE (verified present in this mathlib):
- `ProfiniteGrp.diagram (P : ProfiniteGrp.{u}) : OpenNormalSubgroup P ‚•§ ProfiniteGrp.{u}`, with `@[simps! obj map]`. `(diagram P).obj N = ProfiniteGrp.of (P ‚ßł N.toSubgroup)` (finite). Morphisms in `OpenNormalSubgroup P` (a `Preorder`/`SemilatticeInf`): `M ‚ü∂ N` iff `M ‚Č§ N`, and `(diagram P).map f : (diagram P).obj M ‚ü∂ (diagram P).obj N` is the quotient map `P‚ßłM ‚Ü† P‚ßłN`.
- `ProfiniteGrp.proj {P} (U : OpenNormalSubgroup P) : P ‚ü∂ (diagram P).obj U` is `QuotientGroup.mk`; `Function.Surjective ‚áĎ(proj U)` is `QuotientGroup.mk'_surjective _`.
- `ProfiniteGrp.cone (P) : Limits.Cone (diagram P)` with `@[simps]`, `pt := P`, `ŌÄ.app := proj`. So `(cone P).w f : proj M ‚Čę (diagram P).map f = proj N`.
- `ProfiniteGrp.isLimitCone (P) : Limits.IsLimit P.cone`.
- `ProfiniteGrp.coe_comp (f) (g) : ‚áĎ(f ‚Čę g) = ‚áĎg ‚ąė ‚áĎf`.
- `ProfiniteGrp.exist_openNormalSubgroup_sub_open_nhds_of_one {U : Set G} (UOpen : IsOpen U) (einU : 1 ‚ąą U) : ‚ąÉ H : OpenNormalSubgroup G, (H : Set G) ‚äÜ U`.
- `CategoryTheory.nonempty_sections_of_finite_cofiltered_system {J} [Category J] [IsCofilteredOrEmpty J] (F : J ‚•§ Type v) [‚ąÄ j, Finite (F.obj j)] [‚ąÄ j, Nonempty (F.obj j)] : F.sections.Nonempty`. (in `Mathlib.CategoryTheory.CofilteredSystem`, which must be imported).
- `Functor.sections F = { u | ‚ąÄ {j j'} (f : j ‚ü∂ j'), F.map f (u j) = u j' }`.
- `OpenNormalSubgroup Q` has `SemilatticeInf` but NO `Nonempty`/`OrderTop` instance, and NO automatic `IsCodirectedOrder`. So provide `haveI : IsCodirectedOrder (OpenNormalSubgroup Q) := ‚ü®fun a b => ‚ü®a ‚äď b, inf_le_left, inf_le_right‚ü©‚ü©` to trigger `isCofilteredOrEmpty_of_directed_ge : [Preorder őĪ] [IsCodirectedOrder őĪ] ‚Üí IsCofilteredOrEmpty őĪ`.
- `Continuous.isClosedMap [CompactSpace X] [T2Space Y] (h : Continuous f) : IsClosedMap f`; `.isClosed_range`. For `m : A ‚ü∂ Q`, `m.hom.continuous_toFun.isClosedMap.isClosed_range : IsClosed (Set.range m)`.
- `QuotientGroup.eq : (QuotientGroup.mk a : G ‚ßł s) = QuotientGroup.mk b ‚ÜĒ a‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * b ‚ąą s`.
- `IsOpen.smul (hs : IsOpen s) (c : G) : IsOpen (c ‚ÄĘ s)`. `Set.mem_smul_set : x ‚ąą a ‚ÄĘ t ‚ÜĒ ‚ąÉ y, y ‚ąą t ‚ąß a ‚ÄĘ y = x` (Iff.rfl). `dense_iff_inter_open : Dense s ‚ÜĒ ‚ąÄ U, IsOpen U ‚Üí U.Nonempty ‚Üí (U ‚ą© s).Nonempty`.

PROOF PLAN:
1. Helper `diagram_map_surjective {M N} (f : M ‚ü∂ N) : Function.Surjective ((diagram Q).map f)` via `(cone Q).w f` + `coe_comp` + `Function.Surjective.of_comp` + `QuotientGroup.mk'_surjective`.
2. Helper functor `surjSystem (A Q) : OpenNormalSubgroup Q ‚•§ Type u` with `obj N := SurjContHom A ((diagram Q).obj N)`, `map f s := s.comp ‚ü®(diagram Q).map f, diagram_map_surjective f‚ü©`, and `map_id`/`map_comp` via `funext` + `SurjContHom.hom_injective` + `simp [SurjContHom.comp, Functor.map_id/Functor.map_comp]`.
3. In the theorem: provide `IsCodirectedOrder`; `haveI : ‚ąÄ N, Finite ((surjSystem A Q).obj N) := hfin`; same for Nonempty; `obtain ‚ü®sec, hsec‚ü© := nonempty_sections_of_finite_cofiltered_system (surjSystem A Q)`.
4. Build `c : Limits.Cone (diagram Q)` with `pt := A`, `ŌÄ.app N := (sec N).hom`, naturality from `congrArg SurjContHom.hom (hsec f)` (note `(surjSystem.map f (sec M)).hom` is defeq `(sec M).hom ‚Čę (diagram Q).map f`).
5. `lift := (isLimitCone Q).lift c : A ‚ü∂ Q`; `hfac N : lift ‚Čę proj N = (sec N).hom := (isLimitCone Q).fac c N`.
6. Show `Function.Surjective ‚áĎlift`: range is closed (compact‚ÜíT2) and dense (use `dense_iff_inter_open`: for open nonempty U pick q‚ąąU, get open normal N ‚äÜ q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ‚ÄĘU via `exist_openNormalSubgroup_sub_open_nhds_of_one`, use `(sec N).surj (proj N q)` to get a with `proj N (lift a) = proj N q`, hence `q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * lift a ‚ąą N` via `QuotientGroup.eq`, hence `lift a ‚ąą U`); then `range = closure range = univ`. Conclude `‚ü®{ hom := lift, surj := ... }‚ü©`.

Please produce the COMPLETE Lean code: the `import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.CofilteredSystem` line, the two helper declarations, and the full proof replacing the `sorry`. Pay special attention to: exact orientation of the cone `naturality` field (`app X ‚Čę G.map f = F.map f ‚Čę app Y`), the `Functor.const_obj_map`/`Category.id_comp` simp set, defeq between `‚áĎ(proj N) x` and `QuotientGroup.mk x`, and the `‚ÄĘ` vs `*` defeq (`a ‚ÄĘ b = a * b` for a group acting on itself). Give alternative lemma names where you are unsure.
I‚Äôll validate the Lean/Mathlib API shape while assembling the helpers and theorem, with special care around quotient coercions, cone naturality, and avoiding fragile simplification.

import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.CofilteredSystem

open CategoryTheory Topology
open scoped Pointwise

universe u

namespace Q2Presentation.Profinite

theorem diagram_map_surjective {Q : ProfiniteGrp.{u}} {M N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q}
    (f : M ‚ü∂ N) :
    Function.Surjective ((ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).map f) := by
  intro y
  have hproj : Function.Surjective (ProfiniteGrp.proj N) := by
    simpa using (QuotientGroup.mk'_surjective N.toSubgroup)
  rcases hproj y with ‚ü®q, rfl‚ü©
  refine ‚ü®(ProfiniteGrp.proj M) q, ?_‚ü©
  have hw :
      ProfiniteGrp.proj M ‚Čę (ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).map f =
        ProfiniteGrp.proj N := by
    simpa using (ProfiniteGrp.cone Q).w f
  simpa [ProfiniteGrp.coe_comp] using
    congrArg (fun e : Q ‚ü∂ (ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).obj N => e q) hw

def surjSystem (A Q : ProfiniteGrp.{u}) :
    OpenNormalSubgroup Q ‚•§ Type u where
  obj N := SurjContHom A ((ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).obj N)
  map {M N} f s :=
    SurjContHom.comp s
      ‚ü®(ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).map f, diagram_map_surjective (Q := Q) f‚ü©
  map_id N := by
    funext s
    apply SurjContHom.hom_injective
    simp [SurjContHom.comp]
  map_comp f g := by
    funext s
    apply SurjContHom.hom_injective
    simp [SurjContHom.comp, Category.assoc]

theorem profinite_epimorphism_from_compatible_finite_quotients
    (A Q : ProfiniteGrp.{u})
    (hfin : ‚ąÄ N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q,
      Finite (SurjContHom A ((ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).obj N)))
    (hne : ‚ąÄ N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q,
      Nonempty (SurjContHom A ((ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q).obj N))) :
    Nonempty (SurjContHom A Q) := by
  classical
  haveI : IsCodirectedOrder (OpenNormalSubgroup Q) :=
    ‚ü®fun a b => ‚ü®a ‚äď b, inf_le_left, inf_le_right‚ü©‚ü©
  haveI : ‚ąÄ N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q, Finite ((surjSystem A Q).obj N) :=
    fun N => hfin N
  haveI : ‚ąÄ N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q, Nonempty ((surjSystem A Q).obj N) :=
    fun N => hne N
  obtain ‚ü®sec, hsec‚ü© :=
    nonempty_sections_of_finite_cofiltered_system (surjSystem A Q)
  let c : Limits.Cone (ProfiniteGrp.diagram Q) :=
    { pt := A
      ŌÄ :=
        { app := fun N => (sec N).hom
          naturality := by
            intro M N f
            simpa [surjSystem, SurjContHom.comp] using
              (congrArg SurjContHom.hom (hsec f)).symm } }
  let lift : A ‚ü∂ Q := (ProfiniteGrp.isLimitCone Q).lift c
  have hfac : ‚ąÄ N : OpenNormalSubgroup Q,
      lift ‚Čę ProfiniteGrp.proj N = (sec N).hom := by
    intro N
    simpa [lift, c] using (ProfiniteGrp.isLimitCone Q).fac c N
  have hclosed_range : IsClosed (Set.range (lift : A ‚Üí Q)) := by
    simpa using lift.hom.continuous_toFun.isClosedMap.isClosed_range
  have hdense_range : Dense (Set.range (lift : A ‚Üí Q)) := by
    rw [dense_iff_inter_open]
    intro U hU hUne
    rcases hUne with ‚ü®q, hqU‚ü©
    have hU' : IsOpen ((q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ : Q) ‚ÄĘ U) := hU.smul (q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ : Q)
    have h1 : (1 : Q) ‚ąą ((q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ : Q) ‚ÄĘ U) := by
      rw [Set.mem_smul_set]
      refine ‚ü®q, hqU, ?_‚ü©
      change q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * q = (1 : Q)
      simp
    obtain ‚ü®N, hNsub‚ü© :=
      ProfiniteGrp.exist_openNormalSubgroup_sub_open_nhds_of_one hU' h1
    obtain ‚ü®a, ha‚ü© := (sec N).surj ((ProfiniteGrp.proj N) q)
    refine ‚ü®lift a, ?_, ‚ü®a, rfl‚ü©‚ü©
    have hproj_eq :
        (ProfiniteGrp.proj N) (lift a) = (ProfiniteGrp.proj N) q := by
      calc
        (ProfiniteGrp.proj N) (lift a) =
            (lift ‚Čę ProfiniteGrp.proj N) a := by
          simp [ProfiniteGrp.coe_comp]
        _ = (sec N).hom a := by
          rw [hfac N]
        _ = (ProfiniteGrp.proj N) q := ha
    have hmk :
        (QuotientGroup.mk q : Q ‚ßł N.toSubgroup) =
          QuotientGroup.mk (lift a) := by
      simpa using hproj_eq.symm
    have hNmem : q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * lift a ‚ąą N.toSubgroup :=
      QuotientGroup.eq.mp hmk
    have hNmem' : q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * lift a ‚ąą (N : Set Q) := by
      simpa using hNmem
    have hsmul : q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * lift a ‚ąą ((q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ : Q) ‚ÄĘ U) :=
      hNsub hNmem'
    rcases (Set.mem_smul_set.mp hsmul) with ‚ü®y, hyU, hy‚ü©
    change q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * y = q‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * lift a at hy
    have hy_eq : y = lift a := mul_left_cancel hy
    simpa [hy_eq] using hyU
  have hsurj : Function.Surjective (lift : A ‚Üí Q) := by
    rw [‚Üź Set.range_eq_univ,
      ‚Üź closure_eq_iff_isClosed.mpr hclosed_range,
      Dense.closure_eq hdense_range]
  exact ‚ü®{ hom := lift, surj := hsurj }‚ü©

end Q2Presentation.Profinite
